scripts.db:generate: cp .env packages/database/.env 2>/dev/null || true && cd packages/database && npx -y node@20 ./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js generate
scripts.db:push: cp .env packages/database/.env 2>/dev/null || true && cd packages/database && npx -y node@20 ./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js db push
scripts.db:migrate: cp .env packages/database/.env 2>/dev/null || true && cd packages/database && npx -y node@20 ./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js migrate dev
scripts.db:studio: cp .env packages/database/.env 2>/dev/null || true && cd packages/database && npx -y node@20 ./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js studio
scripts.db:seed: cp .env packages/database/.env 2>/dev/null || true && cd packages/database && npx -y node@20 ./node_modules/tsx/dist/cli.mjs prisma/seed.ts
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed
scripts.dev:api:restart: lsof -ti:4000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; npm run dev:api
scripts.dev:all: npm run dev:api & npm run dev:web & wait
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build
